member.name: T:YasGMP.Converters.NullableDateTimeConverter
member.summary: Converts nullable/unknown date inputs to a safe for UI bindings (e.g., ), and converts back to DateTime?. This avoids XAML warnings like: "'(null)' cannot be converted to type 'System.DateTime'".

member.name: M:YasGMP.Converters.NullableDateTimeConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts (which may be null or various types) into a non-null . Returns when no valid date can be obtained.

member.name: M:YasGMP.Converters.NullableDateTimeConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts the UI value back to the model. If the value can't be parsed as a date, returns null.

member.name: T:YasGMP.Converters.NullToBoolConverter
member.summary: NullToBoolConverter – Converts a value to a that is true when the value is non-null, and false when it is null. Supports inversion either via the property or the string converter parameter "invert" (case-insensitive).
member.remarks: Default mapping: null → false, non-null → true. Set to true or pass "invert" as ConverterParameter to reverse it.

example.code:
<ContentPage.Resources> <ResourceDictionary> <conv:NullToBoolConverter x:Key="NullToBoolConverter" /> </ResourceDictionary> </ContentPage.Resources>
<!-- Enabled only when SelectedItem is not null --> <Button IsEnabled="{Binding SelectedItem, Converter={StaticResource NullToBoolConverter}}" />
<!-- Visible only when SelectedItem is null (invert) --> <Label IsVisible="{Binding SelectedItem, Converter={StaticResource NullToBoolConverter}, ConverterParameter=invert}" />

member.name: P:YasGMP.Converters.NullToBoolConverter.Invert
member.summary: When true, reverses the mapping (i.e., null → true, non-null → false).

member.name: T:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter
member.summary:
Converts an object to a string (or object) by trying several candidate member names in order, returning the first non-empty result.
Pass the candidates via 's parameter as a |-separated list. Each candidate may be a simple name (e.g. Code) or a dotted path (e.g. Parent.Name).
Example XAML:
<Label Text="{Binding ., Converter={StaticResource PropOrFallback}, ConverterParameter=Code|CompanyCode|ContractorCode|SupplierCode|InternalCode}" />
The converter tolerates model changes across versions and avoids XAML binding warnings such as XFC0045 by resolving at runtime. It first tries properties, then fields, then parameterless methods with the exact name, and finally a Get<Name> method (e.g., GetCode).
One-way only: is not supported.

member.name: T:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter.AccessKey
member.summary: Cache key for a member accessor (Type + token).

member.name: M:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter.AccessKey.#ctor(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Cache key for a member accessor (Type + token).

member.name: F:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter.s_accessorCache
member.summary: Compiled accessors cache: (Type, token) → accessor delegate. Thread-safe and bounded by process lifetime.

member.name: M:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts by attempting to evaluate the first non-empty candidate specified in (pipe-delimited list of names/paths).
member.param: The bound object instance (may be null).
A containing candidate names separated by |, e.g. "Code|CompanyCode". Each candidate can be a dotted path like "Parent.Name".
Culture (used when formatting numbers/dates; InvariantCulture is default).
member.returns: The first non-empty formatted value if found; otherwise .

member.name: M:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Not supported (one-way only).

member.name: M:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter.FormatValue(System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Formats any value to a string using invariant culture where possible. Returns null when the value is null.

member.name: M:YasGMP.Converters.PropertyOrFallbackConverter.TryResolvePath(System.Object,System.String,System.Object@)
member.summary: Resolves a dotted path (e.g. "Parent.Name") or a single token against an object graph.

member.summary: Attempts to get a single member value (property/field/dictionary/parameterless method) from .

member.summary: Tries dictionary-like reads by key (string).

member.summary: Represents a no-op accessor used to cache negative lookups.

member.summary: Builds (and returns) an accessor delegate for the given (Type, token) pair.

member.name: T:YasGMP.UI.ToolTipProperties
member.summary:
Provides a project-local, cross-platform attached property for simple tooltips.
Usage in XAML:
xmlns:ui="clr-namespace:YasGMP.UI" <Button Text="Save" ui:ToolTipProperties.Text="Saves current item"/>
This implementation guarantees XAML type resolution and build success even if community toolkit packages are absent. It also mirrors the tooltip text to to improve accessibility.

member.summary: Sets the tooltip text attached to a .

member.summary: When the tooltip text changes, mirror it to to aid screen readers and (on some platforms) native hints/tooltips.

member.name: T:YasGMP.ViewModels.AuditLogViewModel
member.summary:
AuditLogViewModel — robust ViewModel for reading and exporting system_event_log entries (audit/system events).
Data source: DatabaseService.GetSystemEventsAsync (system_event_log-backed extension method). Mapped properties of include:
Id
EventType (e.g., CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/LOGIN/...)
TableName
RecordId
UserId
EventTime (DateTime)
SourceIp
DeviceInfo
Description

member.name: T:YasGMP.ViewModels.DeviationViewModel
member.summary: Ultra-robust ViewModel for Deviation handling, aligned to canonical methods in . This version only uses model members that exist in schema-tolerant Deviation parsing (Title/Severity/Status). It avoids calling DatabaseService methods that don't exist and relies on the canonical InsertOrUpdateDeviationAsync, DeleteDeviationAsync, SaveExportPrintLogAsync, and LogSystemEventAsync.

member.name: T:YasGMP.ViewModels.ExternalContractorViewModel
member.summary:
ViewModel za upravljanje vanjskim izvođačima/serviserima.
• Async CRUD • Pametno filtriranje • Izvoz (preko refleksije – radi i kad metoda ima opcionalne parametre) • Audit povijest (DTO) • Sigurna obavijest o promjenama (INotifyPropertyChanged).
Napomene kompatibilnosti:
Model nema svojstvo Contact. Umjesto toga koristi se . Time se uklanja pogreška CS1061.
Filtriranje po Status/Rating/ServiceType je tolerantno: ako ta svojstva ne postoje u modelu, refleksija vraća null i filter i dalje radi.
Reflektirani pozivi (RollbackExternalContractorAsync, ExportExternalContractorsAsync) podržavaju varijante potpisa s opcionalnim parametrima; kad su dostupni, prosljeđuju se userId, ip, deviceInfo, sessionId i .

member.name: T:YasGMP.ViewModels.LoginViewModel
member.summary:
LoginViewModel – GMP-compliant login logic for YasGMP.
Provides audit hooks (via services), anti-brute-force delay, device/IP forensics, 2FA flow, optional auth placeholders (PIN/Bio/SSO/QR), lock counters, language switch, and MAUI-friendly bindings. Includes a defensive login timeout so database connectivity issues cannot leave the UI spinning forever.

member.name: T:YasGMP.ViewModels.MachineViewModel
member.summary:
MachineViewModel – MVVM ViewModel for GMP-compliant machine/asset management.
• Async CRUD with digital signatures and complete audit trail
• Rollback/versioning via snapshots
• Advanced filtering (status + query)
• IoT/forensics context (IP, device info, session) propagated to the data layer

member.summary:
NotificationViewModel – Robust MVVM ViewModel for notifications, reminders, and escalations.
• GMP/Annex 11/21 CFR Part 11 ready: audit, acknowledgements, device/IP/session context
• Supports in-app, email, SMS, push; export; mute/snooze; batch operations
• Integrates with and for persistence and context

RollbackPreviewViewModel – ViewModel for the Rollback Preview modal/dialog.
• Presents before/after JSON snapshots for an audited change.
• Verifies a digital signature (SHA-256) for forensic traceability, using constant-time comparison.
• Allows enqueuing a rollback request through with UI-thread safe notifications.

member.name: T:YasGMP.Views.ValidationPage
member.summary:
ValidationPage — GMP/Annex 11 compliant editor for validation records (IQ/OQ/PQ/URS/DQ/FAT/SAT).
This page loads validations, supports add/update/delete flows via , and provides robust, thread-safe UI updates using helpers.
• Data sources are resolved via DI first, then AppConfig (connection string fallback).
• intentionally shadows and keeps it synchronized to avoid ambiguity.
• Auto-reselect and scroll-to-selected is supported via CollectionView.ScrollTo.
